plugins.name: swift
plugins.description: Expert guidance on Swift best practices, patterns, testing, logging, and OpenTelemetry

plugins.name: swift-concurrency
plugins.description: Expert guidance on Swift Concurrency: async/await, actors, tasks, Sendable, and Swift 6 migration

plugins.name: swift-nio
plugins.description: Expert guidance on SwiftNIO: event loops, channels, byte buffers, and network protocol implementation

plugins.name: swift-library-design
plugins.description: Expert guidance on Swift library and framework design: API patterns, protocols, result builders, and performance

plugins.name: hummingbird
plugins.description: Expert guidance on Hummingbird 2 web framework: routing, middleware, request context, and REST APIs

plugins.name: postgres-nio
plugins.description: Expert guidance on using PostgreSQL with Swift via postgres-nio

plugins.name: swift-valkey
plugins.description: Expert guidance on using Valkey and Redis with Swift via valkey-swift

plugins.name: database-driver-design
plugins.description: Expert guidance on building Swift database client libraries: wire protocols, connection pooling, and state machines

plugins.name: wendy
plugins.description: Expert guidance on building and deploying apps to WendyOS edge devices

plugins.name: wendy-contributing
plugins.description: Expert guidance on contributing to WendyOS: Yocto builds, agent internals, and system architecture

plugins.name: wendy-swift
plugins.description: Curated Swift package ecosystem for WendyOS and Linux ARM64

plugins.name: wendy-lite
plugins.description: Expert guidance on building WASM apps for Wendy Lite MCU firmware on ESP32-C6

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Linear CLI for issue tracking and project management

plugins.name: swift-server-lint
plugins.description: Linting tool that enforces Swift server best practices from the skills

plugins.name: wendy-cloud-iterate
plugins.description: Autonomous continuous integration loop for the Wendy Cloud repository: starts the dev stack, runs integration tests, diagnoses failures, and applies fixes

plugins.name: wendy-iterating
plugins.description: General-purpose iterate-fix-and-ship loop: worktree per fix, PR workflow, loop pacing, and auto-terminate at 3 clean scans. Pair with a testing skill (e.g. wendy-cloud-testing) that supplies test commands and failure-mode knowledge.

plugins.name: wendy-cloud-testing
plugins.description: Wendy Cloud testing skill: prerequisites, stack setup, make test-swift/test-services, clean definition, failure-mode table, and device testing. Pair with wendy-iterating to drive a continuous fix loop.
